description_long: This is an ornate chandelier-style sconce designed to be suspended from the ceiling, featuring a central circular frame with six evenly spaced arms extending outward. Each arm supports a lampshade with a textured, hammered metal appearance, giving the fixture a sophisticated and slightly vintage look. The central structure is connected to the ceiling by a decorative chain and a round ceiling mount, adding to its elegant and classic appeal. The overall design is symmetrical, with each lampshade positioned equidistantly around the central ring. The metallic finish throughout the fixture reflects light, enhancing its visual impact and making it suitable for upscale urban interiors or public spaces. The sconce's construction suggests durability and a focus on both function and decorative aesthetics.
description: A chandelier-style ceiling sconce with six textured metal lampshades arranged around a circular frame, suspended by a decorative chain and ceiling mount. The design is ornate, symmetrical, and features a reflective metallic finish.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing three of the six lampshades prominently, with the chain and ceiling mount visible above.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the symmetrical arrangement of all six lampshades and the circular frame, with the chain and mount directly above.
description_view_2: Rear angled view similar to the front, highlighting the opposite three lampshades and the overall symmetry.
description_view_3: Side view mirroring view 1, again showing the even distribution of lampshades and the central circular structure.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a vintage, ornate design with a circular frame and hammered metal lampshades, evoking a classic and elegant style. The use of a decorative chain and symmetrical arrangement adds to its traditional and sophisticated appearance.
